title: Everything Bagel Salmon
instructions:
Place everything seasoning into a shallow bowl or pie plate.
Baste the skinless side of the salmon filets with a thin coat of honey and dredge through the everything seasoning to coat.
Heat the oil in an oven safe pan and add the salmon, seed side down and sear for 3-4 minutes.
Flip the salmon over and transfer the pan to the oven. Bake for 6-8 minutes or until the fish is fully cooked.
*If your favorite seasoning does not contain salt, you should salt your salmon filets, to taste, before basting with the honey.
